description: Style NoteMulti purpose bags with oodles of style and tons of detailing mark baggit out - and they also succeed in keeping the designs understated and charming. Easy to pair up with whatever you're wearing to complement any outfit. Go ahead and grab your favourite from Baggit's classy range of bags. Product DetailsGreen bagHas one handle to use as a hand bag and two shoulder straps to convert it into a backpackA flap in front with press buttoned closure and a buckled detailOne main compartment with a draw string tie running through eyelets for closure and internal zippered compartment insideOne small compartment in front with a Velcro closureOne zippered compartment at the backMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 37 cmWidth: 41 cmDepth: 20 cm
